title: arenaria obtusiflora var. ciliaris
intro: Arenaria obtusiflora var. ciliaris, also known as Arenaria ciliata, is a plant species in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). It is a type of flowering plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Arenaria obtusiflora var. ciliaris include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its uses and preparations may vary depending on the region and traditional practices.
